title: Looking for Category Manager at Goibibo

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Goibibo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Goibibo family as a Category Manager in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Goibibo:
Goibibo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo!
